analysis_basis: manual visual analysis of project reference still

framing.subject_crop: upper torso crop with breathing room above head and shoulders visible
framing.face_position: face centered around x=0.48,y=0.28; eyes near upper third
framing.background: office context kept softly visible, not cropped to a plain backdrop

nameplate.role_line: white bold with blue-purple outline/shadow above plate
nameplate.name_box: #5F5AF5 solid rectangle with very large white name

render_directives: Use this only for participant introduction or first clear identification cuts.
Keep the subject large enough that facial expression reads clearly; avoid cutting off the microphone.
Name, title, and role text must come from people_map.json.
Do not render caption subtitles during the interval where the nameplate is visible.
